The '''Ministry of Defense''' succeeded the [[Ministry of War]] as the civilian management of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] during the latter of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] and was headed by the [[Minister of Defense (Five Worlds)|Minister of Defense]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
